originalAlarm.description: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

sanitizedDescription: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
presenceCondition:
(or (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         (not __need___FILE)
         __STRICT_ANSI__
         __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         (not __need___FILE)
         (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
         __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         (not __need___FILE)
         (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES)
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)
         __need___FILE
         APU_HAS_LDAP
         APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY))
model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __need___FILE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun APU_HAS_LDAP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 1b48bb3c1af.c L14: `apr_rmm_init(rmm_lock)` where rmm_lock is declared at L11 (`char* rmm_lock;`) but never initialized. Known bug (// ERROR at L14). PC simplifies to APU_HAS_LDAP=T AND APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY=T — all library macro variants (STRICT_ANSI, USE_EXTERN_INLINES, __need___FILE, __need_malloc_and_calloc) appear in both T/F forms and cancel out completely. The function util_ldap_cache_init requires APU_HAS_LDAP=T, and the apr_rmm_init call requires APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY=T. PC correctly constrained.
